methods.name: initialize_and_create_first_market
methods.desc:
Initialize contract and create first market in one call (FRONTEND FRIENDLY)
SIMPLE REQUIREMENTS: 1. Only contract creator can call this (first time only) 2. Payment TO contract >= 2 ALGO  3. Resolution time: 1 hour to 1 year from now 4. Fee rate: 0-1000 (0% to 10%)

methods.name: create_market_simple
methods.desc:
Frontend-friendly single-call: auto-initialize (if needed) and create market.
- Accepts resolution_time in seconds or milliseconds (auto-detected). - Requires a payment to the app address with >= 2 * min_liquidity (defaults to 1 ALGO). - For the very first call, the caller becomes admin automatically. - After initialization, only admin can create new markets. Returns: market_id (UInt64).

methods.name: create_market
methods.desc: Create additional markets (after contract is initialized)

methods.name: get_market_question
methods.desc: Get market question

methods.name: get_market_pools
methods.desc: Get market pools: (yes_pool, no_pool, total_volume)

methods.name: get_market_status
methods.desc: Get market status: (is_resolved, winning_outcome)

methods.name: calculate_yes_price
methods.desc: Calculate current Yes price (scaled by 1000)

methods.name: buy_yes_shares
methods.desc:
Buy Yes shares in a market
TRANSACTION REQUIREMENTS: 1. Payment transaction must be sent TO the contract address 2. Payment must be from the same sender as app call 3. Minimum payment: 1000 microALGOs 4. Market must be active and not resolved

methods.name: buy_no_shares
methods.desc: Buy No shares in a market

methods.name: resolve_market
methods.desc: Resolve a market with the winning outcome

methods.name: get_total_markets
methods.desc: Get total number of markets created

methods.name: get_platform_fees
methods.desc: Get total platform fees collected

methods.name: withdraw_fees
methods.desc: Withdraw collected platform fees (admin only)

methods.name: get_user_shares
methods.desc: Get user's Yes and No shares for a market

methods.name: redeem_winning_shares
methods.desc: Redeem winning shares for a resolved market

methods.name: get_contract_debug_info
methods.desc: Get contract state for debugging

methods.name: is_contract_initialized
methods.desc: Check if contract is initialized (FRONTEND HELPER)

methods.name: get_contract_status
methods.desc: Get contract initialization status - Returns (is_initialized, admin, total_markets)

methods.name: validate_create_market_params
methods.desc: Validate market creation parameters without creating

methods.name: can_create_market
methods.desc: Check if sender can create markets

methods.name: get_required_payment_for_market
methods.desc: Calculate required payment for market creation

methods.name: market_exists
methods.desc: Check if market exists

methods.name: get_market_creator
methods.desc: Get market creator address

methods.name: simulate_yes_trade
methods.desc: Simulate YES trade without executing - Returns (shares_received, fee_amount)

methods.name: simulate_no_trade
methods.desc: Simulate NO trade without executing - Returns (shares_received, fee_amount)

methods.name: get_market_odds
methods.desc: Get market odds as percentages - Returns (yes_percentage, no_percentage)

methods.name: get_user_position_value
methods.desc: Get estimated value of user's position - Returns (yes_value, no_value) in microALGOs

methods.name: get_box_names
methods.desc: Get box names for a market - Returns (question_box, pools_box, creator_box)

methods.name: get_user_box_names
methods.desc: Get user box names for a market - Returns (yes_box, no_box)

methods.name: validate_trading_params
methods.desc: Validate trading parameters - Returns (is_valid, error_message)

methods.name: get_all_markets_summary
methods.desc: Get summary of all markets - Returns (total_markets, total_volume, total_fees)

sourceInfo.errorMessage: ERROR_100: Contract not initialized - use initialize_and_create_first_market
ERROR_101: Only admin can create markets
ERROR_101: Only creator/admin can create markets
ERROR_103: Payment must go TO contract
ERROR_104: Need at least 2 ALGO (2000000 microAlgos)
ERROR_105: Resolution time must be 1+ hours from now
ERROR_106: Resolution time max 1 year from now
ERROR_203: Payment sender must match app call sender
ERROR_204: Payment must be to contract
ERROR_206: Minimum trade amount is 1000 microALGOs
can only call when not creating
